name: uizze
description: Stop generic UI slop with a free workflow grounded in 800,000+ real web and iOS screens.

interface.longDescription: Ground interface work in real product evidence, define a product-specific design contract, and run a hard finish gate before shipping.
defaultPrompt: Use UIZZE to plan this interface from real product evidence.
Run the UIZZE finish gate on this frontend.
Use UIZZE to remove generic patterns from this UI.
